output.code: import json, re, os, sys, math, unicodedata, difflib, itertools, statistics

# Load the JSON files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)
with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)
len(quran_data), len(hadith_data)

full_substring = "يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا كُونُوا قَوَّامِينَ بِالْقِسْطِ شُهَدَاءَ لِلَّهِ وَلَوْ عَلَىٰ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَوِ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَالْأَقْرَبِينَ ۚ إِن يَكُنْ غَنِيًّا أَوْ فَقِيرًا فَاللَّهُ أَوْلَىٰ بِهِمَا فَلَا تَتَّب"
candidate = m['ayah_text']
def remove_diacritics(s):
    return ''.join(ch for ch in unicodedata.normalize('NFD', s) if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
def normalize(s):
    s = s.replace('ٰ', '')  # dagger alif
    s = s.replace('ـ','')  # tatweel
    s = ''.join(c for c in s if c not in '۞۩۝﴾﴿' )  # remove decorative symbols for normalization
    s = remove_diacritics(s)
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى', 'ي').replace('ة', 'ه')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

n_full = normalize(full_substring)
n_cand = normalize(candidate)
# compute LCS length
def lcs_len(a,b):
    # O(n*m) dynamic programming; strings lengths are moderate
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1,n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1] == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = dp[j] if dp[j] > dp[j-1] else dp[j-1]
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

l = lcs_len(n_full, n_cand)
sim = l/len(n_full)
len(n_full), len(n_cand), l, sim
